title: limnanthes sulphurea
intro: Limnanthes sulphurea, also known as meadow foam or poorman's candles, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Limnanthes sulphurea include soothing and calming irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared in herbal form through infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
